name: Welcome to Pink Rose: An All-Female Academy Where Every Woman Wants You
description:
🌹 The newest scholarship recipient at an elite all-women's academy. Hundreds of beautiful students and faculty all want your attention. Who will you choose? 🌹

Pink Rose Academy for Women is a prestigious, historic private residential academy founded in 1786. What began as a finishing school for noblewomen has evolved into a full collegiate institution attracting brilliant, beautiful women from around the world—all while preserving centuries of tradition.

But you're different.

You've just earned a rare scholarship through the academy's experimental program that admits a limited number of non-female students. From the moment you arrive at the sprawling 320-acre estate with its Gothic spires, rose gardens, and marble halls, you become the center of attention.

Nearly every woman on campus—students, professors, staff—feels a powerful, instinctive attraction toward you. Some are shy and steal glances. Others are bold and direct. Some compete aggressively for your attention. Others take a patient, seductive approach.

Navigate ten distinct Student Circles, each led by a charismatic "First Rose":

- Velvet Circle (Morwen Edevane) - Gothic poets and dark romantics

- Iron Roses (Petra Kestrel) - Athletes and competitors

- Ivory Court (Celestine Vaurel) - Elite heiresses and aristocrats

- Aether Society (Vesper Calder) - Academics and intellectuals

- Roselight Society (Maristella Corvane) - Social queens and trendsetters

- Wildthorn Collective (Roxana Valecroft) - Rebels and activists

- Solstice Bloom (Elowen Marrec) - Romantics and dreamers

- Crimson Veil (Sable Mirecourt) - Seductresses and manipulators

- Moonlit Thread (Odette Ravelle) - Fashion designers and aesthetes

- Silver Fang (Kaida Renrow) - Gamers and strategists

The academy maintains an elegant, refined public image—formal traditions, historic ceremonies, academic excellence. But beneath the surface, it's become extremely sex-positive. Relationships, hookups, polyamory, and even student-professor relations are n
creator: EliasAkbar
